Table of Contents

Interface IUtilityNetworkQueryTracer

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that supply utility network query tracer information.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("190CCDAB-1679-4923-BC92-7D91D69B9189")]
public interface IUtilityNetworkQueryTracer

Properties

TraceConfiguration[int]

Returns the trace configuration for the tier with the given tier ID.

IUNTraceConfiguration TraceConfiguration[int TierID] { get; }

Parameters

TierID int

Property Value

IUNTraceConfiguration
